issues.description: Missing mandatory DON!! cost action. Card text specifies 'DON!! −1' which must be represented as GiveDon action with value -1 before conditional trash/play logic
First action should be GiveDon (cost payment), not TrashFromHand. The trash is a condition ('You may trash this Character'), not the primary action
Trash action lacks condition checking Leader type {GERMA 66}. Condition 'LeaderHasType' must wrap the conditional play logic
PlayFromHand should accept both 'from your hand OR trash' sources, but filter only specifies hand. Need alternate source handling or clarification in DSL structure
excludeSelf:true is correct for self-trash, but structure doesn't clearly represent 'You may trash this Character' as optional prerequisite
